race.comment: YESZEM (10) started favourite last start over 1400m at Hawkesbury but after being shuffled back mid-race she struggled to get involved. Not a great deal of depth to this race and a switch back to 1200m could suit so she deserves another chance. ZOUGOTME (11) is back after a three-month break. Best two figures achieved last prep both came with minor placings here on his home track. Recent trial winner who looks all set for a positive return. SACHI (13) last raced six months ago when midfield over 2100m at the Beaumont track. Needs more ground but don't let her under the guard while fresh from the inside stall. TSARDEAL (5) is yet to break through after three career starts but can figure.
